title: Social Media Content Manager
description:
I’m currently partnering with an exciting international lifestyle and wellness brand to recruit a Social Media & Content Manager for the DACH region.

This is a fantastic opportunity for a fluent German speaker with strong English skills and proven experience across social media, content creation and community engagement.

📍 Munich (Hybrid)

💶 Up to €60,000

🌍 DACH region

This role offers strong ownership across:

✨ Social content strategy

✨ Community growth & engagement

✨ Campaign activation

✨ Influencer collaborations

✨ Localised German-language content

✨ Regional audience development

A brilliant opportunity to join a highly recognised international brand within the lifestyle and wellness space.

If you or someone in your network may be interested, please feel free to message me directly in confidence.

#MunichJobs #SocialMediaJobs #ContentManager #MarketingJobs #DACH #Hiring

About the company
Thomas Brown Recruitment

THE HOME OF DIRECT SELLING RECRUITMENT IN EUROPE

Founded in 2008 by Michele Thomas, Thomas Brown Recruitment was created after she identified a clear gap in the market for a professional, specialist recruiter within the Direct Selling and Consumer Goods industries.

With over 40 years of recruitment experience, Michele built Thomas Brown on values of honesty, integrity, and results — establishing it as the leading recruitment partner for Direct Selling, Beauty, and Wellness brands across Europe.

We specialise in Head Office roles through to Senior Executive positions and with our extensive recruitment and executive search experience, you can trust us to find the right talent for your business or the right role for your next career move!

You are in safe hands

Today, Thomas Brown is recognised as a trusted, award-winning recruitment partner, connecting exceptional talent with the industry’s most respected companies.


ETHICAL. STRAIGHTFORWARD. RESULTS-DRIVEN.

Our mission is simple — to deliver outstanding recruitment experiences built on trust and expertise.
We’re proud of our reputation for honesty, consistency, and results — values that have made us the recruitment partner of choice for Europe’s most respected direct selling companies.

Recognised by the Direct Selling Association with the Partnership Award in 2016 and again in 2025, we’re honoured to be trusted by the industry’s leading brands across the EMEA region.
